channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in JavaScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in JavaScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📜 santifer/career-ops (32743 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: santifer

📝 Repository: santifer/career-ops

📄 Descrizione: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing.

⭐ Stelle: 32743

🍴 Forks: 6457

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent anthropic automation career claude claude-code cli golang interview-prep job-search open-source resume

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-04T18:21:18Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-14T04:39:17Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📜 jackwener/OpenCLI (15149 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jackwener

📝 Repository: jackwener/OpenCLI

📄 Descrizione: Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.

⭐ Stelle: 15149

🍴 Forks: 1444

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent ai-agents ai-tools cli

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-12T04:37:26Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📝 Repository: S-Trespassing/claw-in-chrome

📄 Descrizione: 这是一个放在 Chrome 侧边栏里的助手扩展。解除了Claude in Chrome的登录限制和套餐限制,支持自定义模型供应商,并且支持编辑原插件不支持编辑的参数,让您的大模型在该插件中有更好的表现!
